name: Garden Vegetable and Ham Topping
recipeIngredient: 1 red or yellow bell pepper, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, heat oil. Add ham and onion. Sauté until the onion is soft and the ham is browned, about 4 to 5 minutes. Add mushrooms, broccoli, bell pepper, and chicken broth; bring to boil. Reduce heat. Simmer until vegetables are tender, 6 to 7 minutes.
2. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch with 2 tablespoons water. Stir into ham and vegetable mixture along with parsley, salt, and pepper. Increase heat to high. Bring mixture to boil. Cook until sauce has thickened, about 1 to 2 minutes.
3. Cut potatoes lengthwise, cutting almost to the base of the potato. Mash slightly with a fork, leaving in skins. Spoon ham and vegetable mixture over each potato, dividing evenly.
Makes 4 servings. Preparation time: About 30 minutes. Cooking time: About 15 minutes.
